title: Kya Allah Arsh Par Hai?
description: Quran aur Hadith se maaloom hota hai ke Allah Ta'ala Arsh Par Ista'wa farmai hai
answer:
Jawab

Quran aur Hadith mein wazeeh taur par mazkoor hai ke Allah Ta'ala Arsh par Ista'wa (takhta sakhtah) farmai hai.

Quranic Evidence:

Surah Taha (20:5): 'Ar-Rahman Ala Al-'Arsh Istawa' - Rahmaan (Allah) Arsh par ista'wa farmai hai

Surah Al-Furqan (25:59): 'Alladhi khalaq As-samawat wa Al-Arda wa ma bayna-huma fi sittat ayyam thumma Istawa 'Ala Al-'Arsh' - Jo asmaano aur zameen paida kiye phir Arsh par ista'wa farmai hai

Hadith Evidence:

Imam Bukhari ne Sahih Bukhari mein Hadith naql ki hai ke Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmai: 'Arsh Allah ke liye zameen se upar sama ka sabse ucha mahal hai'

Aqida Ahnaf (Hanafi School):

Hanafi Scholars jaise Imam Abu Hanifa, Imam Tahawi aur doosre ulema ne 'Ista'wa' ki tafseer 'Istila' (siyada - hukmaranni) mein ki hai, matlab Allah ki hukmaranni aur izmat har jagah qayam hai.

Imam Tahawi ne apne Aqida (Al-Aqida Al-Tahawiya) mein likha: 'Wa Al-'Arsh wa Al-Kursi laysa bi muhit bihi Wa Qiyamuhu bi Nafsih' - Arsh aur Kursi (taht-e-Arsh mushkil) Allah ko nahni sakta kyunki woh sab kuch qaim karta hai.

title: Kya Noor Bashar Tha?
description: Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ke baare mein Noor hona ya Bashar (insaan) hona - Quran se sabit kijiye
answer:
Jawab

Nabi Muhammad Mustafa (S.A.W) Bashar (insaan) hain, noor nahi hain. Quran Pak mein kaha gaya hai ke woh ek aam insaan hain jinhein Wahy (ilahi paigham) mila.

Quranic Evidence:

Surah Al-Anbiya (21:34): 'Wa ma arsalna qablaka illa rijalan noohi ilayhim' - Hum ne apne se pehle sirf aisay mard bheje jo insan the

Surah Al-Kahf (18:110): 'Qul innama ana basharun mithlu-kum' - Main ek bashar (insaan) hoon tumhari tarah

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmaya: 'Ek bashar (insaan) hoon, khao piyo, neend lo soo jaao jaise tum karty ho.'

title: Kya Tawassul Jaiz Hai?
description: Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ke wasile se Dua karna - Jaiz ya Jaiz Nahi
answer:
Jawab

Tawassul yaani kis harkat ya makhluq ke zariye Allah se mangna - yeh ek mushkil masla hai jisme ulema mein ikhtilaf hai.

Jaiz Tawassul:

1. Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ke naam se dua karna jaiz hai
2. Salih Aamal se tawassul karna jaiz hai

Jaiz Nahi:

1. Murda se kuch mangna jaiz nahi
2. Shaikh ko Ilah samjhna aur unhain pukarna shirk hai

title: Bidat Ki Haqeeqat Kya Hai?
description: Bidat kya hai aur Islam mein uska maqaam kya hai
answer:
Jawab

Bidat matlab Deen mein kuch naya riwaz darj karna jo Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) aur Sahaba ne nahi kiye.

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmaya: 'Jo shakhs hamare Deen mein kuch naya chiz laaye jo us mein nahi hai, woh us (naya chiz) maqbool nahi.'

title: Kya Mawlid Manana Jaiz Hai?
description: Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ki Mawlid Sharif manana Jaiz hai ya Haram
answer:
Jawab

Mawlid Shareef manana aur Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ka janam divas manana - is mein ulema ke nizar ikhtilaf hai.

Kuch ulema kehte hain: 'Jaiz hai kyunki ye Nabi Kareem ki khushiyon mein shaamil hona hai.'

Doosre kehte hain: 'Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) aur Sahaba ne ye riwaz nahi kiye, isliye bidat hai.'

title: Kya Quran Ko Chhune Ke Liye Wuzu Zaroori Hai?
description: Quran Pak ko hath lagane ke liye wuzu zaroori hai ya nahi
answer:
Jawab - Hanafi Mazlak:

Hanafi Ulema ke nizar: Quran ko chhune ke liye Wuzu zaroori hai.

Daleele Quran: 'La yamassahu illa Al-Mutahharun' - Use sirf paak log chhoo sakty hain.

Jawab - Maliki/Shafai Mazlak:

Inka kehna hai ke wuzu zaroor nahi, lekin adab de sakt hay.

title: Kya Imam Mehdi Ki Aamad Qareeb Hai?
description: Imam Mehdi kab aayenge aur unhone kaun se alamat hain
answer:
Jawab

Imam Mehdi ke baare mein Quran mein seedha mazkoor nahi, lekin Hadith mein kaafi ahadeeth hain.

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmaya: 'Zamin bhalai-i sai bhari hogi par zalm aur jooba se - tab Imam Mehdi aayenge.'

Imam Mehdi ke Alamat:
1. Dajjal ka nuqsaan
2. Zamin ki barkat waapis aana
3. Rehmatien nuzul hona

title: Kya Tasawwuf Islam Mein Hai?
description: Tasawwuf kya hai aur ye Islam mein jaiz hai ya nahi
answer:
Jawab

Tasawwuf matlab ruh aur dil ki paakdamni aur Allah se sila rakhna.

Quran mein farmaya gaya: 'Qad aflaha man tazakkaa' - Kamiyaab ho gaya jo apne apne aap ko paak kiya.

Tasawwuf Islam ka asal hissa hai lekin is mein Shirk aur Bidat ka darakha ho gaya hai.

Sahih Tasawwuf:

Quran aur Sunnat ke mutabiq amal karte hue apne aap ko paak karna.

title: Kya Aurat Ko Masjid Mein Namaz Jaiz Hai?
description: Khwaatin ke liye masjid mein namaz padhna jaiz hai ya ghar mein
answer:
Jawab

Auratein masjid mein namaz padh sakti hain lekin sharait hain:

1. Shuddha paak dil se jain
2. Adaab se jain
3. Hijab se jain
4. Ghar mein namaz zyada behtar hai

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmaya: 'Khwaatin ke ghar unka namaz ghar ka mubarak hissa hai.'

title: Kya Qawwali Sunnah Hai?
description: Qawwali aur Naat sunnah hai ya nahi
answer:
Jawab

Qawwali ka Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ke zamane mein koi mazkoor riwaj nahi hai.

Jab Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ke jamane mein ye nahi tha tab ye bidat hai.

Haan, Nabi Kareem ke faza'il gana ghalat nahi agar us mein haram ba umoor nahi hon.

title: Kya Zikr Bil Jahar Jaiz Hai?
description: Allah ka zikr bhari awaaz se karna jaiz hai
answer:
Jawab

Zikr Bil Jahar (bhari awaaz se Allah ka dhikr) ismein ulema ke nizar ikhtilaf hai.

Kuch Hanafi Ulema kehte hain: Ghar par aur akele jaiz hai
Kuch kehte hain: Kabhi bhi zaroori nahi

Behter tarika yeh hai ke apne haal mein, khufeya (chup chap) zikr karein.

title: Kya Namaz Mein Surah Fatiha Farz Hai?
description: Namaz ke har rakat mein Surah Fatiha zaroori hai
answer:
Jawab - Jumhoor Ulema:

Surah Fatiha har rakat mein farz hai.

Hadith: Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmaya: 'Jis shakhs ki namaz mein Fatiha nahi thi, us ki namaz nahi hui.'

Hanafi Mazlak:

Imam Abu Hanifa ke nizar: Jama'at mein Fatiha padhna zaroori nahi kyunki Imam padh raha hai.

Akele: Fatiha zaroori hai.

title: Kya Aurat Ko Hijab Farz Hai?
description: Khwatin ke liye Hijab aur Purdah Farz hai ya Sunnah
answer:
Jawab

Quran Pak mein Allah ne farmaya: 'Ya ayyuha An-Nabiyu qul li azwajika wa banatihi wa nisa Al-Mu'minin yudneen alayhinna min jalabibihinna' - Apni auraton ko kaha ke apne aap ko orhni se dhank lo.

Hijab/Purdah Farz hai Quran aur Hadith se.

Hijab ke Shraait:

1. Saara badan dhaka hona
2. Chehra dhaka ho ya na ho ismein ikhtilaf hai
3. Shuq (sukhan) se bacha
4. Zevar zahir na hon

title: Kya Roza Toot Jata Hai Agar Injection Lagaye?
description: Roza mein injection dena roza kaam karta hai ya nahi
answer:
Jawab

Roza toot nahi hota agar sirf Injection (dawayi) lagaye ja'e.

Sharte: Injection mein kahin se bhi vitamins ya shakti ka infusion nahi hona chahiye.

Agr IV (intravenous) Saline ya ghiza ka injection ho to roza toot jaega.

Normal Injection jaise Penicillin, Insulin (patient ke ghar mein) - roza nahi tootty.

title: Kya Zakat Har Musalman Par Farz Hai?
description: Zakat kab farz hota hai aur kaun jari karde
answer:
Jawab

Zakat Har Musalman par farz hai jo Nisab (maalun ki hadden) tak pahun chuke ho.

Zakat Nisab:

Sona: 7.5 Tola (87.5 Gram)
Chandi: 52.5 Tola (612.35 Gram)
Ya Paise: Ek Saal Ki Daulat

Zakat Farz Hone Ke Shraait:

1. Muslim hona
2. Akal Mand hona
3. Baligh hona
4. Maal ke Malik hona
5. Ek Saal Maal Paas Hona

title: Kya Quran Mein Har Cheez Ka Bayan Hai?
description: Quran Pak mein har cheez likhi hai ya Sunnah bhi zaroori hai
answer:
Jawab

Quran Pak khud kehta hai: 'Wa anzalna ilayka Al-Kitab tibyanan li kulli shayin' - Hum ne Quran utara har cheez ki tafweel ke liye.

Lekin aslyan Quran Hukmran aur Usool (principles) deta hai, Tafseel (details) Sunnah Nabi se aata hai.

Misal:

Quran mein Namaz ka Hukm hai, lekin Namaz padne ka tarika (rakat, ruku, sujood) Sunnah se pata chalta hai.

title: Kya Namaz Qaza Karna Gunah Hai?
description: Namaz Qaza karne ke liye kya hona chahiye
answer:
Jawab

Namaz Qaza Karna Gunah hai aur Haram hai.

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) ne farmaya: 'Jis shakhs ne ikhtiyar se namaz Qaza ki, usay safed ho jaao'.

Qaza Namaz Karne Ka Tarika:

1. Tauba karo
2. Qaza Namaz padho
3. Age se bacha

Agar Bachpan, Behooshi, ya Mazeeri (majbori) se Namaz Qaza hui to Gunah nahi, lekin Qaza padhni chahiye.

title: Kya Aurat Ko Talaq Dene Ka Haq Hai?
description: Aurat Khud Talaq De Sakti Hai Ya Nahi
answer:
Jawab

Aurat Khud Talaq Nahi De Sakti (Normal halaat mein), Lekin 'Khul' (Aurat ki taraf se Talaq) hai.

Khul Kya Hai:

Aurat Shauhar Ko Maal dey ke Talaq Lena.

Hadith: Khawlah Bint Thalaba ke baare mein Nabi Kareem ne unhe Khul Ki ijaza di.

Doosra Tarika:

Qazi (Islamic Judge) Ke zariye Aurat Talaq pa sakti hai agar Shauhar se naaberaari ho.

title: Kya Imam Abu Hanifa Ki Taqleed Farz Hai?
description: Ek Mazlak ki Taqleed Karna Zaroori Hai Ya Nahi
answer:
Jawab

Taqleed (ek Imam ke Usool par amal karna) Nahi Zaroori, Lekin Behtar Hai.

Kyunki Quran aur Hadith ko samjhna Har Ek Ke Bas Mein Nahi.

Taqleed Ke Fawaed:

1. Deen aur Ijtihad Mein Riwah Shaoor
2. Aqa'al Ka Faida
3. Ek Mamuli Aadmi Sahih Masai Tak Pahunch Sakta Hai

Taqleed Mein Ekhtiyar:

Agar Koi Qawi Daleel Dikhe To Doosra Mazlak Accept Kar Sakta Hai.

title: Kya Quran Ko Translation Ke Saath Padhna Jaiz Hai?
description: Quran Padhte Waqt Translation Padhna Sahi Hai Ya Nahi
answer:
Jawab

Quran Ko Samjhne Ke Liye Translation Padna Zaroori Hai.

Khas Kar Jo Quran Samjhna Chah Raha Ho, Keyal Translation Zaroori Hai.

Lekin:

1. Namaz Mein Quran Ki Translation Nahi
2. Quran Ka Lafz Asal Quran Haan, Translation Sirf Maani Samjhne Ke Liye

Mufassir Ulema ki Translation Lena Behtar Hai (Jaise Al-Qurtubi, Ibn Kathir)

title: Kya Namaz Mein Dua Qunoot Farz Hai?
description: Namaz Ke Baad Dua Qunoot Padhna Zaroori Hai
answer:
Jawab

Dua Qunoot Farz Nahi Hai, Lekin Sunnah Hai Khaas Tor Par Witr Ki Namaz Mein.

Dua Qunoot Kab Padhi Jaaye:

1. Witr Ki Namaz Mein (3 Rakat)
2. Apne Ghar Mein Padho
3. Jamaat Mein Imam Padhe To Muqtadi Suni Sun Salo 'Ameen' Kahe

Hadith:

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) Witr Ki Namaz Mein Dua Qunoot Padha Karte The.

title: Kya Aurat Ko Jummah Namaz Farz Hai?
description: Khwatin Par Jummah Ki Namaz Farz Hai Ya Nahi
answer:
Jawab

Jummah Ki Namaz Sirf Mardoon Par Farz Hai.

Auratein Jummah Nahi Padh Saktee, Sirf Zuhr Ki Namaz Padhenge.

Lekin:

Agar Aurat Jummah Ke Waqt Jama'at Mein Aaye To Khair Nahi, Ghar Mein Hi Zuhr Padho.

Hadith:

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) Ne Farmaya: 'Aurtoon Ka Ghar Unka Masjid Hai' Yaani Ghar Mein Namaz Padhna Behtar Hai.

title: Kya Tasbeeh Se Zikr Karna Bidat Hai?
description: Tasbih (Moti) Se Allah Ka Zikr Karna Bidat Hai
answer:
Jawab

Tasbih Se Zikr Karna Bidat Nahi Hai, Lekin Ye Sunnah Nahi Bhi Hai.

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) Tasbih Istemaal Nahi Karte The, Ulama Ne Yeh Baad Mein Shaaz Kiya.

Usi Mein:

1. Tasbih Se Ginti Karna Mubaah Hai
2. Lekin Farz Nahi
3. Ulama Kehte Hain: Ungliyun Se Ginti Karain Better Hai

title: Kya Quran Mein Allah Ko Dekhna Mumkin Hai?
description: Jannat Mein Allah Ko Dekhna Mumkin Hoga
answer:
Jawab

Jumhoor Ulema Kehte Hain: Jannat Mein Muminen Allah Ko Dekhenge (Roya = Didar).

Quranic Evidence:

Surah Al-Qiyamah (75:22-23): 'Wujuhin yaumaidin nadhirah...ilaa Rabbihim nathirah' - Jannat Mein Cheher Khilaf Ho Jayenge, apne Rab Ko Dekhenge

Hadith:

Nabi Kareem (S.A.W) Ne Farmaya: 'Tum Jaisa Chaand Ko Daikhte Ho Waisa Allah Ko Dekhoge.'

Haan, Is Duniya Mein Allah Ko Nahi Deikh Sakty kyunki Insaan Kamzor Hai.

title: Kya Aurat Ko Eidgah Jana Jaiz Hai?
description: Khwatin Eid Ki Namaz Ke Liye Eidgah Ja Saktee Hain
answer:
Jawab

Auratein Eidgah Ja Saktee Hain Agar Purdah Rakhein Aur Adaab Se Jain.

Hadith:

Aisha (R.A) Se Riwayat Hai: 'Auratein Eid Ki Namaz Ke Liye Jayya Kartee Theen.'

Shareete:

1. Purdah Mein Rhen
2. Purni Hijab Se
3. Sukhiyan Ka Baghair
4. Khana-O-Khud Banate Hain Agar Aaram Ho Saken

Better Ye Hai Ke Ghar Mein Reh Kar Auzar Sunein.
